caption: The video presents a series of presentation slides titled "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" and "Heat Exchanger," featuring a blue header and footer. The slides are authored by "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay," as indicated in the bottom banner. The NPTEL logo is visible in the lower-left corner of each slide. Across the frames, text is progressively added to the screen. The first frame introduces the concept of "Heat Exchanger Effectiveness," denoted by the term "ε." The second frame adds a definition stating it "is defined as a ratio of actual heat transfer that is occurring to the maximum possible heat transfer that can occur theoretically." The third frame introduces a mathematical formula, $\varepsilon = \frac{Q_{act}}{Q_{max}}$. The final frame adds the concluding text that this value "is a dimensionless number between 0 and 1."
